title: Minds and Perceptions: A Comparative Study of Persuasive Techniques During the Galactic Civil War
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Minds and Perceptions: A Comparative Study of Persuasive Techniques During the Galactic Civil War''''' was a work of non-fiction written by [[Ulm-Aaa-Janzikek]] and published by [[TriPlanetary Press/Legends|TriPlanetary Press]].

The work covered in great detail the methods of interrogation, information extraction, and, in some cases, [[Torture/Legends|torture]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
